'''Disruption bubble generators''' were small devices used to disrupt communications monitors by creating a sonic shell. They were used to assure privacy, creating a two-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] zone of silence through which normal sound could not pass. Disruption bubble generators were marketed to [[Music/Legends|music]]-lovers as a way to enjoy music without disturbing anyone else around them. However, due to its usefulness, disruption bubble generators were favored by [[Thief/Legends|thieves]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce]] [[Infiltrators/Legends|Infiltrators]].<ref name="ROE" />

Disruption bubble generators were used on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]].<ref name="TBSB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> [[Audio Performance Incorporated]] manufactured the [[Sheer Silence Bubble Generator]].<ref name="ROE" />
